Full property tour — interior, exterior, pool & guest house

9432 Oakmore Rd · Beverlywood, Los Angeles CA 90035

Beverlywood · 90035

Rare Dual-Structure Luxury Estate

One of the few gated compounds in Beverlywood offering a main residence plus a fully independent detached guest house on a single lot — ~4,492 sq ft of combined living space.

Gated Beverlywood compound with detached guest residence and heated pool/spa in prime 90035. Rare dual-structure configuration offering approximately 4,492 sq ft of combined living space across a 5-bedroom main residence and a private self-contained guest house on a single gated lot. The main residence features open-concept living filled with natural light and a chef's kitchen equipped with dual sinks and dual ovens. Hardwood flooring upstairs and Italian porcelain flooring on the main level complement the clean modern design. The spacious primary suite includes a spa-style bath with steam sauna.

  • Drone aerial footage — exceptional curb appeal
  • Heated in-ground pool & spa with landscaped yard
  • Steam sauna in spa-style primary suite
  • Chef's kitchen — dual sinks, dual ovens, island
  • Detached ~400 sq ft self-contained guest house
  • Smart lighting + Ring security + multi-zone HVAC
  • Gated driveway + EV charging station
  • Walk-in closet, sauna, in-unit washer/dryer
Full Details Photo Gallery

Prime West LA Location

Beverlywood / Pico-Robertson, 90035

Located on a quiet, tree-lined street in one of LA's most sought-after residential neighborhoods. The 90035 corridor sits at the intersection of Beverly Hills, Century City, and Culver City — offering unmatched access to dining, entertainment, healthcare, and major studios.

  • Century City
  • Beverly Hills
  • Fox Studios
  • Cedars-Sinai Medical Center
  • Circle Park
  • Pico-Robertson

Application Requirements

  • → CAR rental application
  • → Full credit report ($49.99, paid by tenant)
  • → Proof of income / funds
  • → All documents submitted as single PDF
  • → 24-hour notice for showings · Agent accompanies all visits
